allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetAdapter | Select-Object Name, InterfaceDescription, Status | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-ItemProperty HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Uninstall\\* | Where-Object { $_.DisplayName -match '\\''VPN|FortiClient|OpenVPN|WireGuard|Cisco|GlobalProtect|Pulse|Zscaler|NordVPN|ExpressVPN|SoftEther|Hamachi'\\'' } | Select-Object DisplayName, DisplayVersion | Format-Table -AutoSize')

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-ItemProperty '\\''HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\WOW6432Node\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Uninstall\\*'\\'' | Where-Object { $_.DisplayName -match '\\''VPN|FortiClient|OpenVPN|WireGuard|Cisco|GlobalProtect|Pulse|Zscaler|SoftEther|Hamachi|AnyConnect'\\'' } | Select-Object DisplayName, DisplayVersion | Format-Table -AutoSize')

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match '\\''vpn|forticlient|openvpn|wireguard|cisco|pulse|zscaler|hamachi|softether'\\'' } | Select-Object Name, Id | Format-Table -AutoSize')

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-ChildItem '\\''C:\\Program Files'\\'', '\\''C:\\Program Files \(x86\)'\\'' -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match '\\''VPN|FortiClient|OpenVPN|WireGuard|Cisco|GlobalProtect|Pulse|Zscaler|Hamachi|SoftEther|AnyConnect'\\'' } | Select-Object FullName')

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-Service | Where-Object { $_.DisplayName -match '\\''VPN|FortiClient|OpenVPN|WireGuard|Cisco|Pulse|Hamachi|SoftEther'\\'' -or $_.Name -match '\\''vpn|forti|openvpn|wireguard|cisco|pulse|hamachi|softether'\\'' } | Select-Object Name, DisplayName, Status | Format-Table -AutoSize')
